subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God from the Sacred Tree hath verily been raised up in truth, and from it thou hearest what the ear of the Beloved heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله من شجره القدس قد کان علی الحق مرفوعا و تسمع عنها ما سمع اذن الحبیب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution
